title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
